name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Proline Adult Cat Food Fish 0.4kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. CONTENTS: Processed animal protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal fat, Fish oil, Corn gluten, Processed Fish Protein (4%), Dried sugar beet, Fish flavor, Rice, Flaxseed, Dry brewer's yeast, Salt, Taurine (3A370), Preservatives - antioxidants (E320 & E321). MINERALS: Iron(3B103), Iodine (3B202), Copper(3B405), Manganese (3B502), Zinc(3B603), Selenium(3B802) VITAMINS: Vitamin A (3A672A), Vitamin D3 (3A671), Vitamin E (3A700), Vitamin C (3A300), Vitamin B1 (3A821), B2 (3A825i), B3 (Niacin-3A315), B6 ​​(3A831), B12 (3A). ), B7 (Biotin-3A880), B9 (Folic Acid-3A316), Vitamin K3 (3A710), Choline (3A890), Calcium Pantothenate (3A841) NUTRIENT COMPONENTS NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENTS Crude Protein 31% Vitamin A (3A672A) 15000 IU/kg Raw oil 20% Vitamin D3(3A671) 1000 IU/kg Ash 8% Vitamin E (3A700) 150mg/kg Crude Cellulose (Fiber) 3% Vitamin C (3A300) 120mg/kg taurine 1000mg/kg
